summary: Tested Task Categories API CRUD and Hardware Check Shift Mapping. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Admin Panel Task Categories tab with Add/Edit/Delete, Deployments page shift tabs (Morning/Night) with proper shift-specific filtering. Fixed bug in Admin Panel where Add dialog was not showing form inputs.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/task-categories returns list from database (not hardcoded)
✓ Default task categories seeded: cooking, cleaning, organizing, outdoor, other
✓ Hardware check status endpoint accepts shift_type query param
✓ Hardware check creation requires shift_type field (morning/night)
✓ Invalid shift_type values are rejected with 400 error
✓ Hardware checks list can filter by shift_type
✓ Shift records include shift field for filtering
✓ Admin Panel Task Categories tab shows all categories with Edit/Delete buttons
✓ Add Task Category dialog shows Category ID and Display Name inputs
✓ Deployments page has Morning Shift and Night Shift tabs
✓ Kit cards are filtered by shift_type - Morning shows only morning records
✓ Kit cards are filtered by shift_type - Night shows only night records
✓ No cross-shift data leakage observed in kit cards
seed_data_creation: Test task categories created with test_ prefix during backend testing (auto-cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Categories CRUD fully verified. Hardware Check Shift Mapping verified - records are properly filtered by shift_type (morning/night). Fixed bug in AdminPanel.js where openAddDialog was using activeTab.slice(0, -1) which incorrectly converted 'task-categories' to 'task-categorie' instead of 'task-category'.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/task-categories returns list from database
Backend: POST /api/task-categories creates new category (admin only)
Backend: Default task categories exist (cooking, cleaning, organizing, outdoor, other)
Backend: Hardware check status accepts shift_type query param
Backend: Hardware check creation with shift_type works
Backend: Invalid shift_type is rejected with 400
Backend: Hardware checks list filter by shift_type works
Backend: Shifts by deployment returns records with shift field
Backend: Start shift includes shift field in request
Backend: Task categories CRUD flow (create, read, update, delete)
Frontend: Admin Panel Task Categories tab shows 5 categories
Frontend: Add Task Category dialog shows form inputs (FIXED)
Frontend: Deployments page Morning/Night shift tabs work
Frontend: Morning tab shows only morning shift records
Frontend: Night tab shows only night shift records (no cross-shift data)
features_verified: Task Categories API: GET /api/task-categories returns list from database
Admin Panel: 'Task Categories' tab shows all categories with Add/Edit/Delete
Deployments page: Activity Type dropdown fetches from /api/task-categories
Hardware Check Shift Mapping: Kit records filtered by shift_type based on current tab
Hardware Check Display: Morning tab only shows shift_type='morning' records
Hardware Check Display: Night tab only shows shift_type='night' records
No cross-shift data leakage in kit cards

bug_fixed.issue: openAddDialog was using activeTab.slice(0, -1) which converted 'task-categories' to 'task-categorie' instead of 'task-category'
